data.title: Cryptocurrency Monero Up More Than 3% In 24 hours
data.description: Over the past 24 hours, Monero's (CRYPTO: XMR) price has risen 3.07% to $158.61. This continues its positive trend over the past week where it has experienced a 5.0% gain, moving from $151.61 to its current price. As it stands right now, the coin's all-time high is $542.33.
